channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large fox dead in middle of the road, 2nd May
item.description:
It’s causing cars to be swerving around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Village Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags ripped open everywhere, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish bags ripped open by foxes and crows and strewn on the streets.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish/ garden waste dumped on road against our front garden wall, 2nd May
item.description:
Noticed it yesterday, seems like garden waste, busy public road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs heavy pruning or removal, 2nd May
item.description:
This tree has never been pruned in the 23 years I’ve lived here. It is so tall now, it’s bigger than the block of flats. Nobody utilises the 2 car spaces adjacent to it as it drops sap that damage the paintwork on cars. Those two spaces are much needed as there aren’t enough spaces as it is for the block. It needs to be cut right back or removed completely - it’s long overdue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kingsgate Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned/Dumped vehicle, 2nd May
item.description:
Vehicle has clearly been in an accident and is covered in dust so it happened a while ago, but the vehicle has only just appeared here. Please note this is public highway and the road does not belong to the housing association as is often mistaken to be the case. The vehicle is taking up a valuable space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kingsgate Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 101 Brondesbury villas by wall, 2nd May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

Fly tipping

item.title: "Boswell Close" low level twin post mounted street/road name sign damaged and laying on pavement. Posts also damaged. Possible vehicle impact damage., 2nd May
item.description:
As above.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boswell Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage Leakage, 2nd May
item.description:
34 London Rd, Bromley, BR1 3QR. There is this sewage leakage leaking down from the complex next to the place pinned with strong bad odour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This car has not moved for more than 21 days, 2nd May
item.description:
It’s a nice car that has never been in the area until it was parked in the current position in Hay st. It hasn’t moved at all since it arrived here probably about a month ago. I wondered if it was stolen and then dumped. It’s quite odd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hay Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M and s trolley by bromley north sign, 2nd May
item.description:
Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Bed base, electrical, broken glass, on Astbury Road, 1st May
item.description:
Two parts of a bed base, small electrical equipment and a lot of broken glass on Astbury Road, by the entrance to Regal Row.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Row, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
